hooks.command: echo '[hook] Java file written — validation will run after build.'
if [ -f artifacts/slice-manifest.json ]; then echo '[hook] Python file written in migration context.'; fi
echo 'BLOCKED: .env files are protected — put config in modernization.config.json or application.yml' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Golden dataset is immutable once created. To regenerate, delete the golden_dataset directory first.' >&2; exit 2
